user.title: Nanit Sound & Light
user.description: Pick which Nanit account to use. The main Nanit integration handles authentication for this addon.

speaker.title: Select Sound & Light Machine
speaker.description: Choose which paired Sound & Light Machine to control.

speaker_ip.title: Speaker IP
speaker_ip.description: Enter the local IP of your Sound & Light Machine (reserve it in your router's DHCP settings).

error.no_speakers: No Sound & Light Machine is paired with the selected Nanit account.
error.discovery_failed: Failed to discover speakers. Check that the Nanit integration is authenticated.

abort.nanit_not_installed: The Nanit integration is not installed or not configured. Install it first, then retry.
abort.already_configured: This Sound & Light Machine is already configured.
abort.no_speakers_on_account: No Sound & Light Machine is paired with this Nanit account.

nanit_entry_missing.title: Nanit integration is missing
nanit_entry_missing.description: The main Nanit integration that Sound & Light depends on has been removed. Install and configure it, then reload this integration.
